title: FrostClient (Classic)
description: Introducing FrostClient, Classic! an open-source Minecraft PVP client built upon CloudClient, designed for version 1.8.9 of the game.
body:
# ❄️ FrostClient (Classic)
![GigaStudios](https://i.postimg.cc/sgDZff0R/Giga-Studios.png)

## About:

FrostClient (Classic) is a 1.8.9 open-source Minecraft PVP Client based on CloudClient, which I forked and modified!

#### Features:
- Customized UI for enhanced experience
- Optimized performance for more FPS
- Enhanced PVP functionalities
- Expanded customization options for personalization

## How to Use:
1. Download FrostClient's Jar.
2. Install FrostClient as you would with any other Minecraft mod.
3. Launch Minecraft and select FrostClient (Classic) from the launcher.
4. Enjoy Frost Client (Classic)

## Announcement:

**Exciting News: A 1.19+ version of FrostClient is coming soon! Stay tuned for more updates.**


## Credits:
🔗 Special Thanks: [CloudClient's GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cloudclientdev/cloudclient)
